Home.villasIntro: Three distinct experiences, each with immersive 360° virtual tours.
Home.amenitiesIntro: Everything you need for an unforgettable stay, included with every villa.
Home.reviewsIntro: Real reviews from guests who experienced {resortName}.
Home.locationCopy: Perched on the hillside overlooking the Gulf of Thailand, {resortName} is minutes from pristine beaches, world-class diving, and vibrant local markets. Yet once inside our gates, the world falls away.
Home.readyCopy: Book direct and save 15% compared to online travel agencies. Includes complimentary airport transfer and welcome amenities.

Chat.intro: I can help pick the right villa, explain direct booking savings, or point you into the 360 tour.
Chat.name: Name
Chat.lineQrDescription: Open LINE on your phone and scan this code to message us.
Chat.bookingCardHelper: Pick dates here and continue to secure booking.
Chat.bookingPromptReady: Perfect. Use the booking card below to review the villa and dates, then continue to secure booking.
Chat.bookingPromptMissingVillaAndDates: Happy to help. Use the booking card below to choose a villa plus check-in and checkout dates.
Chat.bookingPromptMissingVilla: Almost there. Use the booking card below to choose the villa, then continue to secure booking.
Chat.bookingPromptMissingDates: Almost there. Use the booking card below to choose check-in and checkout dates.
Chat.bookingPromptMissingCheckIn: Almost there. Use the booking card below to choose your check-in date.
Chat.bookingPromptMissingCheckOut: Almost there. Use the booking card below to choose your checkout date.
Chat.suggestionCouple: Which villa is best for a couple?
Chat.answerCouple: The Garden Suite is the quietest couples' retreat. If you want more space and your own pool, the Pool Villa is the indulgent step-up.
Chat.answerDirect: Direct booking saves around 15% versus OTA pricing and keeps support with the host. Airport pickup, welcome amenities, and direct WhatsApp help are the big wins.
Chat.suggestion360: Can I see the villa in 360?
Chat.answer360: Yes. Open any villa card or detail page and choose Explore 360. You can move room to room with hotspots and finish directly into booking.
Chat.noConvex: I can help compare villas here, and live chat will connect once Convex is configured for this Next.js app.
Chat.fallback: Please try again, or contact us below.
Chat.sent: I sent that to the concierge. Please use WhatsApp if you need an immediate reply.
Chat.browserGateDescription: This app browser can hide the keyboard or lose chat state. We are opening the same chat in Chrome for a smoother experience.
Chat.browserGateDescriptionSafari: This app browser can hide the keyboard or lose chat state. We are opening the same chat in Safari for a smoother experience.
Chat.browserGateFallback: If Chrome does not open, copy the link and paste it into Chrome or Safari.
Chat.browserGateFallbackSafari: If Safari does not open, copy the link and paste it into Safari.

DemoDisclaimer.title: Demo website only
DemoDisclaimer.body: This website is a product demo. Bookings, payments, invoices, and messages shown here are for demonstration only and do not create real reservations or charges.

SEO.rootTitle: Seaview Residence - Luxury Villas in Koh Samui, Thailand
SEO.rootDescription: A boutique collection of luxury villas perched on the hillside of Koh Samui with panoramic Gulf of Thailand views, private pools, and unhurried island service.

Resort.description: A boutique collection of luxury villas perched on the hillside of Koh Samui, offering panoramic Gulf of Thailand views, private pools, and the kind of unhurried service that turns a stay into a memory.
Resort.locationImageAlt: Aerial view of Koh Samui, Thailand

pool-villa.description: Experience ultimate luxury in our spacious Pool Villa featuring a private infinity pool, open-plan living area, and lush tropical garden. Floor-to-ceiling windows bring the outside in, with stunning views from every room.
pool-villa.storyTagline: Where mornings begin with a private dip under open skies

garden-suite.description: Nestled among tropical gardens, the Garden Suite offers a tranquil escape with a spacious bedroom, modern bathroom, and private terrace. Wake up to birdsong and the scent of frangipani.
garden-suite.storyTagline: A quiet corner of the island, wrapped in green

penthouse.tagline: Boho loft living framed by treetop windows
penthouse.description: Our Canopy Loft Penthouse is a bright, loft-style villa wrapped in tall grid windows, warm wood ledges, soft neutral textiles, and relaxed boho details. A cozy sleeping platform, lounge corner, and kitchenette create an intimate hideaway above the trees.
penthouse.storyTagline: Wake among soft light, warm wood, and treetop windows

Tour.leadSaved: Saved. We'll keep this villa warm in your inbox with direct booking details.
Tour.leadBody: Get the direct booking link and a reminder of the villa you just explored.

pool-villa.headline: Your Stay Awaits
pool-villa.summary: Two sun-drenched rooms, a private infinity pool, and the kind of quiet that lets you hear your own thoughts again. This is not a hotel. This is your home on the island.

highlights.one: Private infinity pool steps from your bed

pool-villa.closingLine: Make this more than a daydream

garden-suite.headline: Your Retreat Awaits
garden-suite.summary: Wrapped in tropical gardens, the Garden Suite is where the pace of life slows to the rhythm of rustling palms. Every detail invites you to stay a little longer.

highlights.four: Daily breakfast with fresh island flavors

garden-suite.closingLine: Make this more than a daydream

penthouse.headline: Your Loft Awaits
penthouse.summary: The Canopy Loft Penthouse feels like a private studio above the trees: bright grid windows, black beams, warm wood, and soft woven textures pulled together into one calm hideaway.

highlights.one: Tall treetop windows with a built-in ledge
highlights.three: Relaxed lounge corner with boho styling

penthouse.closingLine: Make this more than a daydream

pv-r1.title: The pool was absolutely stunning
pv-r1.body: We spent every morning swimming in the infinity pool watching the sunrise over Koh Tao. The villa is even more beautiful in person than the photos. The kitchen was fully equipped and the king bed was incredibly comfortable. Our host was responsive and provided excellent restaurant recommendations.

pv-r2.title: Perfect honeymoon getaway
pv-r2.body: My wife and I chose the Pool Villa for our honeymoon and it exceeded every expectation. The private pool area is so peaceful, and the open-plan living space feels incredibly luxurious. The tropical garden surrounding the villa gives you complete privacy. We will definitely be back.

pv-r3.title: Felt like a five-star resort
pv-r3.body: The villa is impeccably maintained. Every detail has been thought of, from the quality linens to the Bluetooth speaker by the pool. Air conditioning worked perfectly even in the hottest part of the day. The location is quiet but close enough to walk to shops and restaurants.

pv-r4.title: Beautiful villa, great for families
pv-r4.body: We stayed with our two kids and had an amazing time. The pool is safe and the garden provides plenty of space for the children to play. The villa is spacious with two proper bedrooms. Only minor note is that the WiFi could be a bit stronger by the pool area.

pv-r5.title: Best stay in Thailand
pv-r5.body: After travelling through Thailand for three weeks, this was by far our favourite accommodation. The pool villa is paradise. Waking up, opening the sliding doors, and diving straight into the pool - you cannot beat that. The host arranged a private chef one evening which was unforgettable.

pv-r6.title: Superhost for a reason
pv-r6.body: From check-in to check-out, everything was seamless. The villa photos are accurate, the amenities are top-notch, and the location on Koh Tao is ideal. We did the 360 tour before booking and what you see is exactly what you get. Highly recommend.

gs-r1.title: Garden view at sunset was magical
gs-r1.body: The private terrace looking out over the tropical garden is where we spent every evening. Watching the sunset with the frangipani trees swaying - it was like being in a painting. The rain shower is also fantastic after a day at the beach. Such a peaceful retreat.

gs-r2.title: Perfect for couples
gs-r2.body: The Garden Suite is exactly what you need for a romantic getaway. Cosy but not cramped, beautifully designed, and the garden setting feels very private. We loved having breakfast on the terrace every morning. The bed is extremely comfortable.

gs-r3.title: Charming and well-located
gs-r3.body: A lovely space surrounded by nature. The garden is lush and well-maintained, and you can hear birds singing in the morning. The suite itself is modern with nice touches. Walking distance to the best restaurants and dive shops on the island.

gs-r4.title: Great value for Koh Tao
gs-r4.body: Honestly surprised by the quality at this price point. The suite is spotless, tastefully decorated, and the air conditioning keeps it perfectly cool. The garden terrace is a highlight. Communication with the host was quick and helpful.

gs-r5.title: Peaceful island escape
gs-r5.body: Exactly what we were looking for. A quiet retreat with beautiful surroundings. The garden is filled with tropical flowers and the sound of nature is incredibly calming. We used the suite as our base for diving and exploring the island. Highly recommended.

ph-r1.title: A loft hideaway full of soft light
ph-r1.body: The tall windows alone are worth the stay. We had slow mornings on the window ledge, coffee in hand, with the trees just outside. The Canopy Loft Penthouse is beautifully styled with warm wood, woven details, and a kitchenette that made it easy to settle in.

ph-r2.title: Worth every penny
ph-r2.body: We celebrated our anniversary at the Canopy Loft Penthouse and it was perfect. The sleeping nook is cozy, the lounge feels intimate, and the whole space has this calm studio atmosphere. The host arranged flowers and champagne for our arrival. Truly special.

ph-r3.title: The best accommodation in Koh Tao
ph-r3.body: We have stayed at many places on the island but nothing compares to the Canopy Loft Penthouse. The loft feels airy without losing warmth, the designer details are gorgeous, and the treetop windows make every morning feel cinematic.

ph-r4.title: Elevated luxury on a tropical island
ph-r4.body: The attention to detail in the Canopy Loft Penthouse is remarkable. From the quality of the mattress to the kitchenette styling, everything feels intentional. We spent our evenings in the lounge with the string lights on and did not want to leave.

ph-r5.title: Unforgettable stay
ph-r5.body: Traveling with friends, the Canopy Loft Penthouse gave us the space and comfort we needed. The lounge, kitchenette, and sleeping area flow together beautifully, and the treetop light is genuinely stunning. Photos do not do it justice.

pv-ts1.quote: The infinity pool at sunrise is absolutely magical!

gs-ts1.quote: Such a peaceful retreat surrounded by nature.

gs-ts2.quote: Breakfast on the terrace was our favourite part!

ph-ts1.quote: The morning light through the tall windows is beautiful.
